examples: Schell says that for her radio audience, any amount of snark is too much;
she doesn't want to turn off listeners, so her program has a “no snark rule.
The room temperature superconductor has been the "Snark" of modern materials science...
Comments quickly flared, with cynicism, snark and a fair dose of Columbo-style questioning.
In the grand scheme of things, whether or not the ladies of TMZ get equal snark time hardly matters.
